projects.name: PermitPulse
projects.description: A civic-tech interface for surfacing permit workflow signals and local friction.
projects.proves: Operational software can make bureaucratic patterns readable.

projects.name: Xibalba Pinball
projects.description: A playable mythic arcade experiment with a dark underworld pinball atmosphere.
projects.proves: Game feel, theme, and browser-native interaction can ship quickly.

projects.name: Black Swan
projects.description: A strategy prototype exploring rare-event thinking through interactive systems.
projects.proves: Abstract risk ideas can become tactile decision tools.

projects.name: Pumpkin AR Face Filter
projects.description: A seasonal AR concept for face tracking, playful overlays, and shareable effects.
projects.proves: Computer vision features can become approachable public demos.

projects.name: Snapshot Studio
projects.description: A lightweight creative tool for producing polished visual snapshots and assets.
projects.proves: Small tools can compress repeatable creative workflows.

projects.name: The Angeles Crest
projects.description: A location-driven experience shaped around terrain, atmosphere, and memory.
projects.proves: Place-based storytelling can feel cinematic on the web.
